ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Shiba Inu) */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., SHIB) */,
  "crypto_description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the price entry */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "change_usd" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day in USD */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "open_price_usd" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "high_price_usd" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "low_price_usd" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Volume of transactions in USD */,
  "market_cap_usd" REAL /* Market capitalization in USD */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* Number of transactions on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the transaction (number of tokens) */,
  "total_value_usd" REAL /* Total value of the transaction in USD */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_fee_usd" REAL /* Transaction fee in USD */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Unique transaction hash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES price_history ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., volatility, moving average) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame of the analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
